scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:report
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/index.test.js dist/progress-line.test.js dist/render.test.js dist/report/markdown.test.js dist/report/classify-url.test.js dist/report/is-development-url.test.js dist/report/groq-query.test.js dist/report/highlight-groq.test.js dist/report/analyze-groq.test.js dist/report/group-urls-by-kind.test.js dist/report/format-groq.test.js dist/stream.test.js
